session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.4.0: Thu Mar 19 19:30:44 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.101.15~1/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night is an experience that can be both awe-inspiring and unsettlingly beautiful. The vastness of the water stretches out endlessly before you, reflecting stars and creating dramatic silhouettes against the backdrop of the sky. The darkness itself becomes almost tangible, a deep, heavy presence that wraps around you in its embrace. The sense of isolation is overwhelming, yet there's an inexplicable calmness that seems to settle over your heart. The only sounds are distant seabirds or perhaps the occasional rippling wave, adding to the serene yet eerie atmosphere that envelops you completely. This moment can leave one with a profound connection to nature and the raw power of the natural world.
